# Data Source (hush_redis_access_privilege)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Redis access privilege in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_redis_access_privilege" "example" {
  id = "apr-eu12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Redis access privilege

### Read-Only

- `channels` (List of String) The Pub/Sub channel patterns this privilege applies to
- `description` (String) The description of the Redis access privilege
- `grants` (List of Object) The list of Redis ACL grant entries (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--grants))
- `keys` (List of String) The key patterns this privilege applies to
- `name` (String) The name of the Redis access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedatt--grants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grants`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) The action for this grant entry
- `name` (String) The name of the Redis command or category
- `type` (String) The type of grant entry
